fomod.Name: Playwright
fomod.Author: levchimik
fomod.Description:
A scene-control / NPC-puppeteering toolkit for SkyrimNet. Direct who is "in" a scene, narrate it, and put words, thoughts, and sleep into your cast from an on-screen, fully keyboard-drivable PrismaUI control panel.
Requires: SKSE64, Address Library for SKSE Plugins, SkyUI (for the MCM), PrismaUI, SkyrimNet, SeverActions (SkyrimNet Action Pack), and PapyrusUtil SE. Load AFTER SkyrimNet.
